channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jazz come up short in shootout with Phoenix, 134-126
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In an incredible display of shooting by both teams, the Utah Jazz could not keep up with the Phoenix Suns in a 134-126 loss Friday night at the Delta Center. Both teams made 22 three-pointers and shot well over 50 percent from the field.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Joel Embiid sustains sinus fracture fighting for rebound, misses 2nd half of 76ers' loss to Pacers
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid sustained a sinus fracture when he was struck in the face going for a defensive rebound late in the first half of the Philadelphia 76ers’ loss to the Indiana Pacers on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn eager for her return to World Cup ski races next weekend in Switzerland at age 40
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Lindsey Vonn now has a firm target for her return to World Cup ski racing at age 40: next weekend for a pair of super-G events in St. Moritz, Switzerland. She has a goal, too, and it's not showing up at the starting gate simply to show up.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NBA Cup semifinal matchups in Las Vegas: Thunder-Rockets, Bucks-Hawks
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Winning the NBA Cup won't bring a championship parade to Oklahoma City or Houston or Atlanta or Milwaukee. There's a trophy. There's some cash. There are bragging rights. And that's about it. The way the final four teams in the tournament see things, that's enough.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pro Football Hall of Famer Randy Moss reveals cancer diagnosis, 6-hour surgery
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Fame wide receiver Randy Moss said Friday he is being treated for cancer and is recovering from major surgery. In an appearance on Instagram Live, Moss, aided by a cane, introduced himself as a cancer survivor and thanked his “prayer warriors” for their support.
item.dc:creator: ZACH ALLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs acquiring All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in trade with the Astros, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are acquiring All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in a trade with the Houston Astros, paying a big price for one of baseball's best hitters, a person familiar with the situation said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: US Olympic and Paralympic officials put coach on leave after AP reports sexual abuse allegations
item.description: The U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee placed an employee on administrative leave Thursday after The Associated Press reported that one of its coaches was accused of sexually abusing a young biathlete, causing her so much distress that she attempted suicide.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: WNBA owner questions why Caitlin Clark was named Time Athlete of the Year, suggests it will cause racism
item.description: Washington Mystics owner Sheila Johnson said that Time Magazine should have put the whole WNBA on its cover instead of just Caitlin Clark.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Belichick says he spoke with UNC legends, including Michael Jordan and Lawrence Taylor, before taking job
item.description: Bill Belichick joined North Carolina on a five-year deal, but he did not accept the contract without first speaking to some of the school's legends.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Star outfielder Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed Sunday to a record $765 million, 15-year contract, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press, a deal that could escalate to $805 million and is believed to be the largest pact in team sports history.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers beat the Bears 38-13 to snap 3-game skid
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — After weeks of shaky play, the San Francisco 49ers got back to their old form with one of the most dominant first halves in years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: LeBron James misses 1st game this season, sidelined versus Portland due to left foot soreness
item.description: LeBron James will sit out Sunday's game against the Portland Trail Blazers due to left foot soreness, the NBA career scoring leader's first missed game of the season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Matchup set for 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl at Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: The 45th annual DIRECTV Holiday Bowl will feature Syracuse vs. Washington State on December 27, 2024, at Snapdragon Stadium in San Diego, Sports San Diego announced Sunday. The game will be broadcast live on FOX.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: BYU to play Colorado in Alamo Bowl December 28
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team will be taking on a fellow Big 12 team in a bowl game this season. #17 BYU and #23 Colorado both accepted invitations to play in the Alama Bowl December 28th in San Antonio. The game will be televised on ABC4 at 5:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: We only know 1 of the teams in the upcoming Rose Bowl game so far. Here's why
item.description: We now know the matchup of college football's most prestigious event, the Rose Bowl Game, "The Granddaddy of Them All," that will take place on Jan. 1. Well at least we know half of it.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LA Galaxy strike early, hold off New York Red Bulls 2-1 to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: CARSON, Calif. (AP) — The LA Galaxy finished 26th in the 29-team Major League Soccer standings just one season ago, and their biggest supporters boycotted certain matches to protest a decade of poor performance.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What happens when 'The Simpsons' join 'Monday Night Football'? Find out during Bengals-Cowboys
item.description: On Monday night, the entire Simpsons universe gets to experience it in a way not many could have imagined. The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFL QB Jayden Daniels scores Christmas toys for kids in San Bernardino
item.description: What does a rising star in the NFL do when his team is on its bye week? Washington Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels decided to make sure the kids back home have a great holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
